summary: Verified the 3 landing-page bug fixes on /az and /tr (font swap to Sora, i18n-driven hero chat preview, mobile-responsive HeroVisual). All 14 acceptance criteria from the review request pass. No backend testing required — landing page is fully static.
critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.jsx HeroVisual is clean: aspect-[5/6] on mobile + aspect-square on sm:+ correctly prevents bottom clipping; rotate-1/0 on mobile and rotate-3/-rotate-2 on sm:+ preserve the original tilted card design at desktop.
index.html now loads a single Google Fonts CSS2 link covering Manrope+Sora with latin-ext implicitly via Google Fonts; no Fontshare/Clash request is made in the network tab — verified.
i18n keys hero.preview.{customer,ai,msg1,ai1,msg2,ai2,active} present and complete in both az.json and tr.json.

verifications.az_h1_fontFamily: Sora, Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif (Sora replaced Clash Display)
verifications.mobile_390_bubble_count: 4 chat bubbles + status row all rendered inside card (verified visually in screenshot)
verifications.desktop_rotations_preserved: rotate-3 (~3deg) and -rotate-2 (~-2deg) confirmed via computed transform matrix at 1366x900
verifications.yarn_build: succeeded in 4.54s, dist/index.html 0.98 kB, css 44.82 kB, js 274 kB

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 covered ONLY the public landing page (/az and /tr) per main-agent scope. Dashboard/auth/orders untouched (last verified iteration_6). The HeroVisual chat preview is now i18n-driven via t('hero.preview.*'), aspect ratio adapts (5/6 mobile, square sm:+), rotations attenuated on mobile (rotate-1, 0) and full on sm:+ (rotate-3, -rotate-2). Sora fully replaces Clash Display in tailwind display fontFamily and index.html Google Fonts link.
rca of the issue: Not applicable — this iteration was a verification of fixes applied by main agent. All 3 reported bugs (Azerbaijani schwa rendering, hardcoded AZ chat preview on TR locale, mobile chat preview clipping) are fully resolved.
